question:
Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^3:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..2,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 33.971.

Q_0 = [[10, 0, -2], [0, 6, 2], [-2, 2, 6]]
c_0 = [-2, 2, 1]
Q_1 = [[5.5, -6, 5], [-6, 8.5, -6], [5, -6, 6.5]], c_1 = [-3, 3, -1], d_1 = 9.0
Q_2 = [[9.5, -5, 4], [-5, 6.5, -3], [4, -3, 2.5]], c_2 = [4, -2, 0], d_2 = 22.0

What is the minimum value of the objective?

Consider the convex quadratically constrained quadratic program over x in R^3:
Minimize (1/2) x^T Q_0 x + c_0^T x
subject to x^T Q_i x + c_i^T x <= d_i for i=1..2,
and ||x||_2^2 <= 36.0.

Q_0 = [[4, -1, -1], [-1, 6, -3], [-1, -3, 4]]
c_0 = [3, -1, -2]
Q_1 = [[9.5, 5, 1], [5, 6.5, 1], [1, 1, 6.5]], c_1 = [-2, 0, 4], d_1 = 82.5
Q_2 = [[12.5, 2, 0], [2, 5.5, 5], [0, 5, 6.5]], c_2 = [1, -3, -2], d_2 = 32.5

What is the minimum value of the objective?
